metadata.description: CO-STAR UI Creator: structured prompting (Context, Objective, Style, Tone, Audience, Response) for building or integrating React/Next.js UI, design systems, and registries (shadcn, Magic UI, Aceternity), or for creating custom CO-STAR prompts.

plugins.name: co-star-ui
plugins.description: CO STAR UI: discovery-first UI builds (components, pages, design systems) and custom CO-STAR prompt creation; supports Newsprint integration and modern React registries.
